findings.description: `HttpResponse` is a PascalCase class name used in the s2 code example (`return new HttpResponse("/ss11AC/W11AC0202.jsp")`) but is absent from s2 hints.
`HttpResponse` is a PascalCase class name used in the s3 code example (`return new HttpResponse("/ss11AC/W11AC0203.jsp")`) but is absent from s3 hints.
